en_title: Drafting a Letter from the Heart
en_body:
moon
shines aslant
the western
tower-roof...
a winter
branch imprints
one stroke
upon the
sorrowing night
a bird
flies swift
a streak
of rose
its startled
cry
lost
into the air
a cup of
lotus tea
smoke rising, rapturous
one stick of incense
fragrant beyond measure
a poem
without boundary

night
carries the year,
the calendar
turns its page
within the silence
the rhythm
of the clock
revolves

a candle
sways
glimmering
the shadow trembles
the pen
drunk
with scent of ink
suddenly
a page of love-poetry

soul-companion
far
hidden
beyond Heaven's road
winter night
drafting
a letter of vows
simple

promising
to meet together
within
dawn
dawn
of Happiness
breathing fragrance
into
the New Year..!!

(12-12-2012)
note: Lotus tea and incense place the intimate letter within a Vietnamese contemplative ritual of remembrance and devotion.
